---
title: "CMY\'s Collected Works"
---

## CMY\'s Collected Works

**Type:** topic

### About

CMY was keen to see her works reprinted in a cheaper format, and she was evidently urging Alexander Macmillan to undertake a collected edition in the mid-1860s.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
